key_npc_reasons: {npc} now sits close enough to the trouble around {settlement_name} that other powers must account for them.
{npc} has become too influential in {settlement_name} to remain a background figure.
{npc} now stands where local leads, threats, and obligations begin to meet.
key_npc_notes: {npc} carries enough influence to redirect rumors and opportunities.
{npc} has become a hinge point for local tensions and cooperation.
{npc} now matters often enough that future events may gather around them.
ally_phase_events: Word spreads that {npc_a} and {npc_b} are quietly coordinating matters in {settlement_name}.
Several locals remark that {npc_a} and {npc_b} seem to be moving in step lately.
{npc_a} and {npc_b} are said to be sharing information before anyone else hears it.
at_odds_phase_events: Rumors suggest {npc_a} and {npc_b} are working against one another in {settlement_name}.
A dispute tied to {npc_a} and {npc_b} leaves the settlement watching for the next misstep.
People whisper that {npc_a} and {npc_b} are pulling local affairs in opposite directions.
neutral_phase_events: A cautious meeting between {npc_a} and {npc_b} changes little openly, but people in {settlement_name} take note.
{npc_a} and {npc_b} are seen exchanging guarded words without showing their full intent.
Nothing obvious comes of the latest contact between {npc_a} and {npc_b}, though the mood around them shifts.
